---
title: Nanoporetech
date: 2026-01-01
published-title: Created
date-modified: last-modified
title-block-banner: "#212529"
toc-title: "Contents"
execute:
    eval: false
format:
    html:
        code-tools:
            source: true
            toggle: true

---

## [Oxford Nanopore](https://nanoporetech.com/platform/technology)

- Offers real-time analysis (for rapid insights)
- Scalable formats from pocket to population scale
- Can analyse native DNA or RNA and sequence
- Any length of fragment to achieve short to ultra-long read lengths.
- Without amplification or chemical modification
- Can span entire repetitive regions, resolve structural variants, and differentiate between different isoforms.

## Nanopore workflow

- basecalling: Convert raw signal data into nucleotide sequences.
